text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to ask Narita Taishin something, so I go
looking for her on the rooftop. I don't see her
right away, but then I hear a voice...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, another ad? I've hardly been able to
progress the story because of these damn ads...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh, what's this one? "Real results in just three
days!" "Get rid of old, dead skin cells!" "Reveal a
fresher, brighter you!"

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list:
Don't even think about buying shady products
like that!

Don't even think about buying shady products
like that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Don't scare me like that. I'm not gullible
enough to believe something so stupid, anyway!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she says, but it seems like she's worried about
her skin.
